_meta.regenerationPolicy: Update on every Sunday Palace Review. Sprint plan in docs/planning/2026-W{n}-sprint.md is the canonical source — this JSON is the machine-readable shadow that backs /sprint.

lastWeek.label: Week 20

highlights.title: AIS (Agentic Intelligence System) Public OSS
highlights.description: github.com/frankxai/agentic-intelligence-system MIT. 12 commits. Plan A v0.1 substrate (ais-core + ais-emit, 26/26 tests).

highlights.title: Partnerships Swarm
highlights.description: 3-agent parallel swarm. Lane B credibility patches + Lane A /work/ namespace + Lane C unlisted /partnerships/proposal/[slug]. PR #71 → c65ca85f.

highlights.title: ACOS dev→public sync
highlights.description: FrankX .claude/agents/* + .claude/commands/* now 1:1 mirror to github.com/frankxai/agentic-creator-os. 28-file Trees-API sync.

highlights.title: Meta-Architecture three-layer spec
highlights.description: Layer 0 SIS primitives → Layer 1 Intelligence Systems → Layer 2 canonical harness. /ais slash command shipped (6 lanes).

highlights.title: Ikigai V8 → V9 Coach-driven prompts
highlights.description: Audience-first proactive 8-prompt stack. Core principle: make the assistant complete the system from weak signals.

highlights.title: Storage + Speaking spec
